summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FOMO Crypto Intelligence Platform. Backend APIs working perfectly on localhost, but critical frontend-backend integration issue prevents authentication.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend cannot authenticate - backend API returns 503 via external URL but works on localhost
integration_issues.details: Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://bootstrap-parser.preview.emergentagent.com but backend only accessible via localhost:8001

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix backend URL routing - external URL returns 503 while localhost works. Either fix proxy/ingress configuration or update frontend .env to use working backend URL.
